document.title: Usability Engineering Plan; Usability Engineering Report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Controlled usability engineering plan and report forms revised on 2024.04.01. for KGMP, ISO 13485, FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR Article 10 requirements.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as controlled forms for usability engineering planning and reporting within the quality manual and procedures documentation.
keyPoints: Usability Engineering Plan is Document No 705-1 with Rev. No 0.
Usability Engineering Report is Document No 705-2 with Rev. No 0.
Revision history states complete revision in accordance with KGMP, ISO 13485:2016, EN ISO 13485:2016+A11:2021, FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 requirements.
